name: AI Hackathon 2026
description: 48-hour hackathon focused on building AI-powered solutions for campus problems. Prizes worth $5000. Teams of 3-4 members.

name: Machine Learning Workshop
description: Hands-on workshop covering neural networks, CNNs, and RNNs using PyTorch. Beginner-friendly with prerequisite Python knowledge.

name: Robotics Demo Day
description: Demonstration of student-built robots including autonomous drones, line followers, and robotic arms. Open to all students.

name: Battle of Bands
description: Inter-college band competition. 8 bands competing for the title of Campus Rockstars. Food stalls and bonfire after the event.

name: Dance Competition
description: Solo and group dance competition across classical, contemporary, and hip-hop categories. Celebrity judges from the industry.

name: Drama Night
description: Annual theatre production featuring 3 one-act plays written and directed by students. Themes on social issues and campus life.

name: Inter-College Cricket Match
description: T20 match between our college and State University. Entry free for students with ID card. Cheer for your team!

name: Basketball Tournament Finals
description: Final match of the inter-department basketball tournament. CS vs Mechanical. Come support your department!

name: Guest Lecture: Quantum Computing
description: Distinguished lecture by Dr. Arun Kumar from IIT Bombay on the future of quantum computing and its applications in cryptography.

name: Research Paper Writing Workshop
description: Learn how to write and publish research papers in top-tier conferences. Tips on LaTeX, literature review, and peer review process.

name: Coding Club Weekly Meet
description: Weekly competitive programming practice session. Solve problems from Codeforces and LeetCode. Snacks provided!

name: Photography Walk
description: Early morning photography walk around campus. Learn landscape and portrait techniques. Bring your DSLR or smartphone.
